name: Burning Skull Head
name_jp: バーニング・スカルヘッド
desc: When this card is Special Summoned from your hand, inflict 1000 damage to your opponent. You can remove from play this face-up card you control to return 1 removed from play "Skull Flame" to its owner's Graveyard.
mnst_eff: When this card is Special Summoned from your hand, inflict 1000 damage to your opponent. You can remove from play this face-up card you control to return 1 removed from play "Skull Flame" to its owner's Graveyard.
eff: When this card is Special Summoned from your hand, inflict 1000 damage to your opponent. You can remove from play this face-up card you control to return 1 removed from play "Skull Flame" to its owner's Graveyard.

action: Returns the player's banished cards to the Graveyard
Returns the opponent's banished cards to the Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself from field for cost
